name: openoutreach
description: An AI-powered LinkedIn automation tool designed to identify and find potential sales leads automatically, targeting professionals and businesses for outreach and marketing efforts.

inputs.name: target_market_description
inputs.description: Text description defining the target market or audience characteristics.

inputs.name: product_description
inputs.description: Brief textual description of the product or service to tailor lead searching.

inputs.name: search_criteria
inputs.description: Parameters including keywords, industries, locations, job titles, or other filters to refine lead identification.

inputs.name: LinkedIn_credentials
inputs.description: Authentication information to access LinkedIn for automation purposes.

outputs.name: lead_list
outputs.description: An array of identified leads matching the input criteria, including profiles and contact information.

outputs.name: automation_report
outputs.description: Summary or log of automation activity, such as number of leads found and actions performed.

steps: User inputs product and target market descriptions.
AI analyzes inputs to generate lead identification criteria.
Automation connects to LinkedIn with credentials.
System searches and filters LinkedIn profiles matching criteria.
Leads are collected and compiled into a list.
Automation executes predefined outreach actions if configured.
use_cases: Sales teams seeking to automate lead generation on LinkedIn.
Marketing agencies targeting specific professional demographics.
Recruiters identifying potential candidates based on job profile.
Entrepreneurs automating prospecting to scale outreach efforts.

prompt_templates.name: lead_generation_prompt
prompt_templates.template: Find leads on LinkedIn for a product targeting {target_market_description}. The product description is: {product_description}. Use these criteria: {search_criteria}.
